name: agentpay
description: AgentPay — buyer-side economic intelligence for AI agents. Find, judge, and pay for the best paid x402 tool within a budget: discover across the marketplace, skip the stubs, rank by real usage (not price), and cap + receipt every payment. Multi-chain (Base or Stellar), peer-to-peer, no custody.

plugins.name: agentpay
plugins.description: Buyer-side economic intelligence for agents: find, judge, and pay for the best paid x402 tool within a budget. Discovers across the marketplace, drops stubs, ranks by real usage (not price), caps + receipts the spend. Multi-chain (Base or Stellar).
